source.notes: View labels, section titles, and explanatory copy are authored for the Property Snapshot prototype.

property.title: Property Value & Tax Snapshot
property.description: Assessment-year property information, taxes, levies, and market context in one unified view.

details.title: Property details
details.description: Basic public-record information used to understand the property before reviewing value and taxes.

taxCycle.title: Where are we in this property's tax process?
taxCycle.description: PAD calendar milestones frame where the property sits before values, protests, budgets, levies, and tax bills are final.

valueHistory.title: Value and tax history
valueHistory.description: Assessment-year view: current value first, with prior finalized tax bills for context.

indexedTrends.title: How are this property's value and taxes moving together?
indexedTrends.description: This chart resets both values and taxes to the same starting point so their changes can be compared side by side.

market.title: Market Area Value & Tax View
market.description: Neighborhood and tax-district context for comparing property value movement, tax movement, and effective tax rate trends.

overview.title: How is this property's market area performing?
overview.description: PAD R&O residential statistics show how the property's valuation group compares with the countywide residential study.

ratioComparison.title: How does this market area compare with the county?
ratioComparison.description: Selected valuation group compared with all Gage County residential qualified sales.

priceContext.title: What prices are represented?
priceContext.description: Average adjusted sale price and average assessed value for the selected group.

county.title: County Value & Tax View
county.description: Countywide value, levy, and effective tax rate context for comparing local movement against broader assessment patterns.

overview.title: How is Gage County moving as a whole?
overview.description: Countywide value growth, tax-burden movement, and district context.

assessmentAccuracy.title: How close are county appraisals to market value?
assessmentAccuracy.description: COD, PRD, level of value, and COV show whether assessments are moving toward tighter, more equitable results.

countyIndexed.title: How are county values and taxes moving?
countyIndexed.description: Illustrative indexed view for countywide taxable value and tax movement.

countyEtr.title: What share of county value becomes taxes?
countyEtr.description: Countywide ETR context gives reviewers a broader baseline.

statewide.title: Statewide Value & Tax View
statewide.description: A statewide comparison frame for understanding whether local value and tax movement appears typical or unusual.

overview.title: How does this pattern compare statewide?
overview.description: Statewide context for local value growth, tax movement, and ETR changes.

countyComparison.title: How does the property's county compare?
countyComparison.description: Compare the current county against the statewide baseline or one other Nebraska county.

stateIndexed.title: How are statewide values and taxes moving?
stateIndexed.description: Illustrative indexed view for statewide comparison.

stateEtr.title: How is statewide ETR trending?
stateEtr.description: A statewide ETR benchmark helps place local tax burden in context.

demographics.title: Demographics & County Profile
demographics.description: Population, housing, economy, and valuation-base context for understanding the county behind the assessment data.

overview.title: Who and what make up Gage County?
overview.description: County profile and demographics context for population, housing, economy, and valuation-base composition.

valueMix.title: What makes up the county value base?
valueMix.description: Major valuation categories from the county profile extraction.

ageMix.title: How is the population distributed by age?
ageMix.description: County age cohorts from the demographics worksheet.

population.title: Where is the population concentrated?
population.description: Municipal population context pulled from the county profile worksheet.
